domain: Mediterranean amphora wax/pitch seal storage — pine pitch lining + clay seal allow long-term wine/oil storage with integrity preservation.
specific_mechanism: Pine pitch impregnated into clay reduces liquid permeability; resin stopper seals mouth; intact seal = original contents preserved.
llm_application: AMPHORA-KV: each KV-cache entry sealed with cryptographic hash on creation. Long-lived entries carry seal hash + per-token rounding-error compensation buffer. On retrieval: seal verified, compensation buffer applied. Cross-session/device sharing safe via seal.
novelty_claim: LMCache (2025) uses content-addressing for KV S3 sharing. Tutti (2026/5) provides SSD persistence. None combine seal + precision compensation. Content-addressing alone is published.
